tagline: French voice dictation — hotkey to pasted text in <1s. Single orchestrator (pipeline.py), one Groq HTTP/2 socket, three platforms.
generated_for: Agent map — read this file before adding a feature so you know where state lives, which module to extend, and which contracts must be preserved.

nodes.label: User
nodes.role: Presses F2 (or double-taps Fn). Speaks. Presses again to stop.

nodes.label:
Groq API
(api.groq.com)
nodes.role: Whisper turbo (STT) + chat completion (cleanup) over a single HTTP/2 connection shared by stt.py and cleanup.py.

nodes.label:
OS keyboard
(pynput · evdev)
nodes.role: Linux X11/Wayland, macOS Quartz, Windows hooks. Fn key surfaces as KEY_WAKEUP/KEY_FN on Linux only.

nodes.label:
Microphone
(sounddevice · PortAudio)
nodes.role: 16 kHz mono int16 PCM, 50 ms blocks.

nodes.label:
OS clipboard +
paste keystroke
nodes.role: wl-copy+wtype / xclip+xdotool / pbcopy+osascript / SetClipboardData+SendInput. Ctrl+Shift+V on Linux to survive zsh/tmux/vim.

nodes.label:
MPRIS players
(playerctl)
nodes.role: Spotify / YouTube / VLC / mpv paused during recording, resumed at end. Linux only.

nodes.label:
OS autostart
(systemd · launchd · HKCU)
nodes.role: Daemon runs at login. Wizard writes the unit; CLI restarts it on update.

nodes.label:
config.toml
(~/.config/dicton)
nodes.role: Single source of truth. chmod 600 on the Groq API key.

nodes.label:
stats.jsonl
(append-only)
nodes.role: One JSON line per dictation. Read by `dicton stats`.

nodes.label:
dicton.lock
(runtime dir)
nodes.role: fcntl.flock / msvcrt.locking — blocks a second daemon from paste-racing the first.

nodes.label: __main__
nodes.role: Thin shim → cli.app.

nodes.label: cli
nodes.role: Typer app with 5 commands. Bare `dicton` smart-starts: wizard if no config, else delegate to systemd if autostart, else inline foreground run.

nodes.label: wizard
nodes.role: 5-step rich-terminal first-launch flow: system check → Groq key → hotkey → 4-model self-test with timings → autostart toggle.

nodes.label: config
nodes.role: Dataclasses + tomllib load/save. Embeds the locked-down French cleanup prompt (DEFAULT_PROMPT) and the 4 allowed cleanup models.

nodes.label: stats
nodes.role: Append a Dictation dataclass per dictation; summarise() folds the file into a Summary (count, chars, typing saved, avg latencies).

nodes.label: singleton
nodes.role: Acquire-and-hold exclusive file lock. Closing the handle releases it.

nodes.label: platform
nodes.role: Cross-platform autostart enable/disable. Wizard's step 5.

nodes.label: runtime
nodes.role: Daemon entrypoint: acquire singleton, instantiate Visualizer + Pipeline, start the pipeline, then block on the pygame main loop (required on macOS).

nodes.label:
pipeline
· State machine ·
nodes.role: The only module that owns the full lifecycle. Wires hotkey + audio + chunker + Groq HTTP + paste. Soft cap 500 LOC in CI — if it grows, extract to a sibling.
owns: asyncio loop on a background thread

nodes.label: fn_key
nodes.role: Linux-only evdev listener for KEY_WAKEUP (143) / KEY_FN (464-466). Detects double-tap within 300 ms and emits on_press(is_double_tap). pynput handles Fn on macOS/Windows.

nodes.label: chunker
nodes.role: Rolling int16 PCM buffer. RMS dBFS detector cuts at silence boundaries with overlap; emits wav bytes via callback so STT runs in parallel with recording. flush() drains the tail at hotkey-up.

nodes.label: stt
nodes.role: POST /audio/transcriptions to Groq Whisper turbo. pcm16_to_wav() helper. prewarm() warms the TLS+HTTP/2 socket on each recording start.

nodes.label: cleanup
nodes.role: POST /chat/completions to Groq with the locked French prompt. Falls back to the raw transcript on any error so a cleanup hiccup never loses the dictation.

nodes.label: audio_session
nodes.role: Linux only. playerctl pauses every MPRIS player currently Playing, returns the list; resume_players replays them at the end of the dictation.

nodes.label: output
nodes.role: Place text on the clipboard and synthesise the paste keystroke. Per-OS branches; on Linux uses Ctrl+Shift+V to survive zsh/tmux/vim.

nodes.label: visualizer
nodes.role: Pygame donut on the main thread. FFT-driven wave around a Flexoki-orange ring; pulsing concentric ring during processing. Hidden via XShape mask (never show/hide window — would steal focus). Sticky across i3 workspaces.

events.title: Daemon up
events.detail: singleton lock acquired, asyncio loop runs on a background thread, httpx.AsyncClient(http2=True) opened, pynput Listener + FnKeyListener armed, visualizer mapped invisibly via XShape.

events.title: Hotkey press
events.detail: F2 (any platform) or Fn double-tap (Linux via evdev, macOS via pynput). State lock flips IDLE→RECORDING and schedules _begin on the loop.

events.title: Session opens
events.detail: Chunker reset · audio_session.pause_active_players (MPRIS) · stt.prewarm(client) warms TLS+HTTP/2 to Groq · sd.InputStream(50 ms blocks) starts · visualizer.set_state("recording") swaps the XShape to the donut.

events.title: Audio in flight
events.detail: Each 50 ms PCM block: push to viz queue (FFT donut) and feed the chunker. Chunker tracks RMS dBFS; when min_chunk_s elapsed and silence_window_s of silence seen → emit a chunk (with overlap_s overlap into the next). Max cap: max_chunk_s.

events.title: Chunks fly to Groq
events.detail: Each emitted chunk spawns an asyncio task on the shared httpx client (HTTP/2 multiplexed). Tasks are stored by chunk_id so order is preserved on join.

events.title: Hotkey press again
events.detail: InputStream stopped + closed. chunker.flush() emits the tail before _session is cleared. visualizer.set_state("processing") swaps the donut for the pulsing ring.

events.title: Join transcripts
events.detail: await each STT task in chunk order; concatenate with spaces. Failed chunks are logged and skipped — the dictation doesn't fail because one chunk timed out.

events.title: Cleanup pass
events.detail: Single chat completion with the locked French prompt (config.DEFAULT_PROMPT). Falls back to the raw transcript on any error.

events.title: Paste
events.detail: Place text on clipboard (wl-copy / xclip / pbcopy / SetClipboardData) then synthesise Ctrl+Shift+V (Linux) / Cmd+V (macOS) / Ctrl+V (Windows). 20 ms sleep before the keystroke lets the focused app see the new clipboard.

events.title: Persist + resume
events.detail: Append one JSONL line with recording_ms / process_ms / stt_ms / cleanup_ms / chunks. Resume every MPRIS player paused at step 3.

events.title: Back to idle
events.detail: Donut disappears via XShape (window never re-mapped → no focus theft). Log line `dictation: N chars · recording=Ams · process=Bms (stt=Cms cleanup=Dms) · chunks=K`.

invariants: pipeline.py is the only module that owns runtime lifecycle. Domain logic that grows there must be extracted to a sibling — 500 LOC cap enforced by scripts/check.sh lint.
One httpx.AsyncClient (http2=True) is shared by stt.py and cleanup.py — same TLS handshake, same multiplexed connection. Do not open a second client.
State transitions go through pipeline._advance(can_start: bool) under self._state_lock. Never mutate self._state directly.
The donut window is never show()/hide()'d — visibility is driven by the XShape mask so the visualizer never steals input focus.
audio_session.resume_players() must run on both the happy path (pipeline._end) and the shutdown path (pipeline.stop) — otherwise the user's music stays paused after a crash.
cleanup.cleanup() must fall back to the raw transcript on any exception. A cleanup error never costs the user their dictation.

chunker.rationale: Empirically tuned in refonte-v2. Below 6 s the silence cut is too eager; above 20 s a single chunk blocks the join.

methods.doc: Emit whatever audio is left as a final chunk.
